summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of pregnancy nutrition app Apple App Store health compliance features completed successfully. All 20+ test scenarios passed including disclaimer modal system, educational language usage, symptom detection, and compliance requirements.
passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Disclaimer modal appears on first load and blocks app access
Session storage working - disclaimer doesn't reappear in same session
Disclaimer reappears correctly in new browser sessions
Inline disclaimer banners present on all required pages (Home, Food Detail, Q&A)
Food search functionality working with proper results
Food cards display correct safety badges (safe/limit/avoid)
Food detail pages show educational language ('Generally considered', 'Often limited')
Sources section present on food detail pages (WHO, CDC, NHS)
Q&A symptom detection working for all tested keywords: bleeding, fever, severe pain, vomiting, dizziness
Q&A returns proper medical care message for symptom-related questions
Q&A normal nutrition questions return educational answers
When to Seek Care section visible on Q&A page
About page accessible from footer navigation
About page shows educational purpose and non-medical statement
About page lists data sources (WHO, CDC, NHS, ACOG)
Footer navigation working correctly between Search/Q&A/About pages
Category filtering functionality working on home page
All interactive elements properly clickable with data-testid attributes
